title: SsoAdvanced Universal Probes qPCR
description: Bio-Rad probe-based (hydrolysis probe) 20 uL qPCR: fast Sso7d activation, 40 cycles, no melt curve.

ingredients.name: DNA template (cDNA 100 ng-100 fg; gDNA 500 ng-5 pg)

payload.notes: Probe-based (hydrolysis probe) chemistry, so there is no melt curve. Primers 250-900 nM each (final), probe 150-250 nM (final); the probe annealing temperature should be 8-10 C higher than the primers. The 95 C 30 sec activation is for cDNA; for genomic DNA use 95 C for 2-3 min. Anneal/extend can be 10-30 sec on the Bio-Rad CFX; use 60 sec on standard-mode ABI or Roche cyclers. 35-40 cycles. Source: SsoAdvanced Universal Probes Supermix instruction manual (Bio-Rad 10031340), https://www.bio-rad.com/webroot/web/pdf/lsr/literature/bulletin-10031340.pdf
